{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212308327B294116D6C42B479607"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616029555280216894","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"[委屈][委屈]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773248069,"group_id":"7601964578662009918","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新手作者，故事尚显稚拙，期待与你相遇。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzNCDXYplSmzMhxMLi6J18g=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8c4520e080f44d768043e96ec75ce78d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616118&x-signature=BzcARQ5%2BKuVbKcSLvjGn%2Bd6ykR8%3D","user_id":"98424104803","user_name":"墨青颖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"98424104803","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601964578662009918","book_info":{"abstract":"当陆明的手指被那卷泛黄竹简划破时，他以为这不过是又一次古玩市场的失败购物。直到鲜血渗入竹简的刹那，一只浑身是伤的九尾狐凭空出现，撞翻了他的书架。

“救救我们…”狐狸口吐人言，眼中闪烁着将死之人才有的光芒，“他们正在猎杀《山海经》里的所有生灵…”

从这一刻起，陆明平凡的研究生生活被彻底撕裂。他手中的竹简成了连接两个世界的钥匙——一边是现代的钢筋水泥，一边是正在崩塌的山海经世界。应龙在CBD的玻璃幕墙间哀鸣，饕餮躲在垃圾处理厂啃食残渣，而那个自称“净世会”的组织，正手持青铜古剑，誓要将这些“不该存在的怪物”赶尽杀绝。

但最可怕的发现还在后面：每消失一只异兽，现实世界就会遗忘一段对应的神话。当陆明眼睁睁看着《山海经》的文字在古籍上消失时，他突然明白——被猎杀的不是怪物，而是人类最古老的记忆。而他，这个连蟑螂都不敢打的废柴研究生，竟成了拯救两个世界最后的希望…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/cc32530d9309926bff86a6ed51a8e2ed~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨青颖","author_id":"","book_id":"7601964578662009918","book_name":"山海经：最后的守经人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#78c0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":875,"name":"山海经","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=875&name=山海经&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602084602315817496","read_count":"4","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"796851"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"143","tags":"都市高武,都市,都市异能,山海经,灵气复苏","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cc32530d9309926bff86a6ed51a8e2ed~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779289712&x-signature=oQzSwAXFyN5H6VYLMRDshujdqVY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98424104803","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"70"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212308327B294116D6C42B479607"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":13840,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7601964578662009918","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":1,"score_text":"1人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"202603212308327B294116D6C42B479607","message":"请求成功"}
